'''nahata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicandrenone|nicandrenone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicandrenone|nicandrenone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nahata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næhætæth|næhætæth]] || [[word:næhætæj|næhætæj]] || [[word:næhætæsh|næhætæsh]] || [[word:næhætæ|næhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahahatath|nahahatath]] || [[word:nahahataj|nahahataj]] || [[word:nahahatash|nahahatash]] || [[word:nahahata|nahahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahatath|nahatath]] || [[word:nahataj|nahataj]] || [[word:nahatash|nahatash]] || [[word:nahata|nahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahaftath|nahaftath]] || [[word:nahaftaj|nahaftaj]] || [[word:nahaftash|nahaftash]] || [[word:nahaftaf|nahaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahatatha|nahatatha]] || [[word:nahataja|nahataja]] || [[word:nahatasha|nahatasha]] || [[word:nahataka|nahataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahatath|nahatath]] || [[word:nahataj|nahataj]] || [[word:nahatash|nahatash]] || [[word:nahata|nahata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahatathal|nahatathal]] || [[word:nahatajal|nahatajal]] || [[word:nahatashal|nahatashal]] || [[word:nahatakal|nahatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahatathatha|nahatathatha]] || [[word:nahatajaja|nahatajaja]] || [[word:nahatashasha|nahatashasha]] || [[word:nahataka|nahataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahatathan|nahatathan]] || [[word:nahatajan|nahatajan]] || [[word:nahatashan|nahatashan]] || [[word:nahatakan|nahatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahatathaoro|nahatathaoro]] || [[word:nahatajaoro|nahatajaoro]] || [[word:nahatashaoro|nahatashaoro]] || [[word:nahatakaoro|nahatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
